artwork.title: Moor Evensong
artwork.summary: Heather light and a distant chapel bell at evensong.
artwork.description: Soft watercolour washes of moorland evening light, paired with a short pianoforte phrase intended for the panel.

media.altText: Watercolour moorland at evening with a distant chapel.
media.caption: Primary panel.
Pianoforte phrase intended for the panel.
media.transcript: Slow pianoforte in B minor; one repeating bell-like motif.
